purpose: Role model setup memory for offline/shadow comparison only. No execution authority.

role_models.name: NSE 13:30 Window A+
role_models.required_structure: Silver Bullet DOL -> sweep -> MSS -> FVG retest
role_models.ob_requirement: OB overlap helpful but not mandatory
role_models.h4_h1_bias_requirement: prefer H1/H4 aligned or ranging; avoid hard counter-trend
role_models.ideal_entry_condition: price returns inside valid FVG during 13:30 NSE window
role_models.ideal_sl_logic: structure/sweep protected SL; do not tighten blindly
role_models.ideal_tp_logic: liquidity-pool target with current CB6 staged exits
role_models.ideal_trailing_logic: breakeven only after confirmed favorable expansion; trail after 1.5R when path data supports it
role_models.learning_note: Strongest robust historical template. Prioritize as shadow role model, not live auto-filter.

role_models.name: NSE Short + Displaced FVG
role_models.required_structure: short setup with valid MSS and FVG retest
role_models.ob_requirement: not mandatory; if no OB then require stronger score/context
role_models.choch_requirement: accepted only if not fighting higher timeframe
role_models.h4_h1_bias_requirement: prefer bearish alignment or no counter-trend conflict
role_models.ideal_entry_condition: bearish FVG retest after sweep/MSS with displacement
role_models.ideal_sl_logic: above sweep high or structural invalidation
role_models.ideal_tp_logic: opposing liquidity pool; current CB6 staged exit model
role_models.ideal_trailing_logic: protect after T1/1R; avoid premature BE before structure clears
role_models.learning_note: Best broad directional edge. Future NSE shorts should be compared strongly against this template.

role_models.name: Forex Short + BOS + Displaced FVG + Score >= 10
role_models.required_structure: BOS continuation with valid bearish FVG retest
role_models.ob_requirement: optional; no OB allowed only with score >= 10 and clean displacement
role_models.h4_h1_bias_requirement: prefer H1/H4 bearish alignment; avoid counter-trend
role_models.ideal_entry_condition: bearish BOS plus displaced FVG inside active forex kill zone
role_models.ideal_sl_logic: above structural high/sweep high with broker spread buffer
role_models.ideal_tp_logic: opposing liquidity pool; staged exit model
role_models.ideal_trailing_logic: BE after real expansion; review with live MFE/MAE
role_models.learning_note: Useful Forex template, but lower confidence than NSE. Needs more live/backtest samples before promotion.
